title: Marked Down
description: This might just be the most cynical—and thus true-to-life—entry in the Woman With a Magazine Job canon.
hook: A razor-sharp take on the exhausting performance of being a woman with literary ambitions in a dying industry—cynicism as truth.

title: Performance Cuts Through the Noise at the Venice Biennale
description: Florentina Holzinger and Miet Warlop transform the Austrian and Belgian pavilions into immersive spectacles of endurance, ecological dread, and controlled collapse.
hook: Two artists transform festival pavilions into brutal endurance spectacles that collapse under their own weight—performance as ecological reckoning.

title: Inside the Shaolin Monastery that Helped Build Victor Wembanyama
description: "This is the story of how 34 generations of Shaolin warrior history trained a once-in-a-generation NBA superstar."
hook: How 34 generations of Shaolin monastery discipline shaped a once-in-a-generation NBA player—discipline as inherited knowledge.
